subcodes.first_line: The Ancient Beauty hath migrated from the Land of Mystery, even as was decreed in the Tablet, if ye be of them that understand [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد هاجر جمال القدم من ارض السر و کذلک قدر فی اللوح ان انتم من العارفین
subcodes.subjects: @universal human capacity for spiritual recognition, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @chastisement and requital, @the divine emanation; the all-pervading bounty of God
